title: helichrysum platypterum
intro: Helichrysum platypterum, also known as the yellow bush or gold of life, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of helichrysum platypterum include its ability to alleviate pain and discomfort associated with arthritis, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
